title: bidens raiateensis
intro: Bidens raiateensis, also known as the Raiatea Bidens or Raiatea Nasturtium-Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to French Polynesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bidens raiateensis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Bidens raiateensis is prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory infections.
